data.revised_prompt: photorealistic cinematic Japanese drama film still, professional book-summary video visual, warm natural light, quiet emotional realism, shallow depth of field, detailed lived-in environment, 16:9, no readable text. same main character in every image: East Asian woman in her early 30s, shoulder-length straight black bob haircut with soft bangs, cream knit cardigan over a plain white top, dark skirt, calm tired eyes, natural face, no heavy makeup. Scene 03/8, Family pressure implied. Specific shot: single woman in a small morning kitchen holding an unopened letter, two untouched rice bowls across the table imply family tension, soft window light. Exactly one visible person. Blank paper only, no readable words. Connect to this Chinese subtitle theme without writing text in the image: 这样的片刻极其珍贵鸠子怀念独自生活时的轻盈并不是不爱现在的家而是人在承担许多身份之后依然需要一个不被任何角色占用的角落妻子、母亲、店主、代笔人这些身份都是真实的可在这些名字之外她也只是鸠子她需要听见自己的声音哪怕那声音很小像热红酒蒸汽里一点甜而辛香的气味书名叫《山茶的情书》情书当然是重要的可是这里的情书并不只属于年轻恋人它也属于逝去的人属于错过的人属于无法再
